data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: YouTube utilizes a microservices architecture to scale its numerous services across millions of users.
data.technical_spec: Services are deployed on Google Cloud Platform using containers and Kubernetes.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: A robust CDN is employed to deliver video content efficiently to users worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Google Cloud's global network and caching systems.

data.title: Data Storage
data.description: Massive amounts of video data are stored using a distributed database.
data.technical_spec: Uses Google Cloud Storage and Bigtable for video and metadata storage.

data.title: Real-time Data Processing
data.description: Processes user data and engagement metrics in real-time to enhance user experience.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates platforms like Apache Kafka and Google Pub/Sub for streaming data.

data.title: Front-end Performance Optimization
data.description: Ensures the website and app deliver low-latency interactions and fast load times.
data.technical_spec: Implements React and other JavaScript optimizations for a seamless UI.
